title: CSS Grid Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of the essential properties for creating powerful, two-dimensional layouts using CSS Grid.

questions.question: CSS Grid is considered a __________ layout model.
Which CSS property on the grid container is used to define the quantity and size of columns?
What is the 'fr' (Fractional) unit specifically used for in CSS Grid?
options: To set the font size in grid cells.
To represent a fraction of the available space in the grid container.
To tell the grid to rotate by 45 degrees.
To hide images in the grid.

questions.question: Which property allows you to name areas of your grid visually to make the CSS easier to read?
The 'gap' property on a grid container sets the spacing between which elements?
options: Between the grid container and the browser edge.
Between all grid cells (both rows and columns).
Between the text inside a grid cell.
